privileged_info_summary: This task creates a synthetic Person BOLO (Be On The Lookout) record in OpenCAD, an open-source Computer Aided Dispatch system for GTA V roleplay communities. The BOLO record details are: Name 'Marcus Holloway' (a fictional composite character), Male gender, Last Known Location 'Vinewood Blvd' (a real location from Grand Theft Auto V), and physical description including African American male, approximately 6'1" tall, 185 lbs, short black hair, dark blue hoodie, white sneakers, and skull tattoo on left forearm. All metadata values match the task requirements exactly. This is test data generated for benchmarking AI agent interaction with simulated police dispatch systems and contains no real personally identifiable information.
